properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: For all He's done I'm gonna lift my hands and praise Him For all He's done I'll try to live my life to please Him Even though I don't deserve to live My life has just begun And I can't help but praise the Lord For all He's done

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Every morning when I wake to see the sun I can't help but think about the Lord And all the things He's done He meets my every need You know He's been so good to me And I can't help but praise the Lord For all He's done

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There are many things that I could praise God for And if I started now, until I die There'd still be many more If I could mention only one I'd have to thank Him for His Son Now that's enough to praise the Lord For all He's done

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For all He's done I'm gonna lift my hands and praise Him For all He's done (for all He's done) I'll try to live my life to please Him Even though I don't deserve to live My life has just begun And I can't help but praise the Lord For all He's done

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: For all He's done (for all He's done) I'm gonna lift my hands and praise Him For all He's done (for all He's done) I'll try to live my life to please Him Even though I don't deserve to live My life has just begun And I can't help but praise the Lord For all He's done

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Even though I don't deserve to live My life has just begun And I can't help but praise the Lord For all He's done (for all He's done) For all He's done
